content:
Zeqian (Neil) Min Sunnyvale, CA | +1 (858) 319-8899 | minzeqian@gmail.com | LinkedIn
EXPERIENCE Google LLC | Software Engineer Aug 2022 - Present
Spearheaded the data import/export infrastructure within the Data Migration team, driving the end-to-end design, implementation, successful launch, and ongoing customer-facing escalation support for mission-critical data mobility systems. Architected and launched a high-performance parallel data import/export pipeline to run alongside the legacy single-threaded system, accelerating transfer speeds by 10x and bypassing the 5TB Google Cloud Storage (GCS) limit via dynamic file chunking. Drove the end-to-end delivery of safe-cancellation and real-time progress reporting for multi-day migration operations by parsing and aggregating logs across mysqldump, mysqlsh, and pg_dump, granting enterprise customers granular control over compute resources. Optimized system efficiency and substantially reduced CPU, memory, and disk consumption by fine-tuning compression levels, adjusting upload chunk sizes, and configuring database flag values to maximize cache utilization. Led the integration of data migration services with Google Dataplex, enabling enterprise clients managing thousands of database instances to synchronize and visualize data catalog changes within seconds. Designed and integrated comprehensive monitoring dashboards and core workflows into Google’s internal One MCP platform, establishing baselines for weekly performance reviews and standardizing service operations. WeShare (Shenzhen) Ltd. (Tencent Affiliation) | Software Engineer Internship Jun 2021 - Sep 2021
Implemented scalable internal data monitoring APIs utilizing MyBatis, Spring Boot, and MySQL, and enhanced the core functionality of the company’s optical character recognition (OCR) system. ApplySquare Education & Technology, Co. Ltd. | Software Engineer Internship Aug 2020 - Oct 2020
Deployed and managed a robust data storage testing environment for a Smart Campus Project by leveraging Docker, Kubernetes clusters, Kafka, and Rancher. PROJECTS AI Voice Synthesis Pipeline (so-vits-svc) | Aug 2023 - Nov 2023 Engineered an end-to-end voice conversion data pipeline using Python and PyTorch, automating audio preprocessing, acoustic model fine-tuning, and batch inference to generate high-fidelity personalized audio tracks (YouTube). RoboCup (Robot Soccer Cup) | Oct 2019 - Dec 2020 Engineered the core control and networking systems for a fleet of autonomous robots in the Small Size League, implementing reliable UDP communication protocols and optimizing real-time pathfinding algorithms (A* and JPS) to enhance gameplay execution. EDUCATION University of California San Diego | Sep 2018 - Mar 2022 Bachelor of Science in Computer Science Major GPA: 3.8/4.0 (Provost Honors)
SKILLS Languages: Java, Go, C/C++, Python, SQL, Bash Infrastructure & Frameworks: Docker, Linux, Kubernetes, Spring Boot, MyBatis, Vim Core Concepts: Distributed Systems, Concurrent Programming, Performance Tuning

  • Architected and launched a high-performance parallel data import/export pipeline to run alongside the legacy single-threaded system, accelerating transfer speeds by 10x and bypassing the 5TB Google Cloud Storage (GCS) limit via dynamic file chunking.
  • Drove the end-to-end delivery of safe-cancellation and real-time progress reporting for multi-day migration operations by parsing and aggregating logs across mysqldump, mysqlsh, and pg_dump, granting enterprise customers granular control over compute resources.
  • Optimized system efficiency and substantially reduced CPU, memory, and disk consumption by fine-tuning compression levels, adjusting upload chunk sizes, and configuring database flag values to maximize cache utilization.
  • Led the integration of data migration services with Google Dataplex, enabling enterprise clients managing thousands of database instances to synchronize and visualize data catalog changes within seconds.
  • Designed and integrated comprehensive monitoring dashboards and core workflows into Google’s internal One MCP platform, establishing baselines for weekly performance reviews and standardizing service operations.
